ques: Identify the most downloaded English-Chinese (en-zh) machine translation model on Huggingface and report its latest performance metrics and usage guidelines.
answer: The most downloaded en-zh model is Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-en-zh (~112,436 downloads/month). Latest metrics — Tatoeba-test.eng.zho: BLEU 31.4, chr-F 0.268 (brevity penalty 0.896), Apache-2.0, MarianMT transformer trained 2020-07-17. Usage: English→Chinese; preprocessing is normalization + SentencePiece (spm32k); a sentence-initial target-language token like `>>cmn_Hans<<` is required; run via Transformers `pipeline("translation", model="Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-en-zh")` or `AutoTokenizer`/`AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM` (translation pipeline needs transformers<5.0.0, else load the model directly).
